title: Mixed Doubles Bonspiel
content:
# Mixed Doubles Bonspiel

**Was November 7-9, 2025 - See you next year!**

\[The information below pertains to the 2025 event\]

* 24 teams - 4 game guarantee - $240 per team
* Mixed Doubles format - 1 male and 1 female on a team
* All meals provided at Triangle Curling Club

### Triangle Club Teams

* Pending non-Triangle registration, 4 or more Triangle Curling Club teams will be selected.
* Must enter full team by September 26th. Teams will be selected shortly thereafter.
* Both team members must be Triangle members to be considered a Triangle team.
* **Do not register on the website.** To be entered into the lottery, send your full team roster to [contact email].

### Location

Triangle Curling Center - 2310 So Hi Drive, Durham, NC 27703 - 4 sheet dedicated curling facility

### Hotel

* A room block is available at the Residence Inn by Marriott Raleigh-Durham Airport/Brier Creek for 144.00 USD - 149.00 USD per night - Last Day to Book: Thursday, October 16, 2025
* [Booking Link](https://www.marriott.com/event-reservations/reservation-link.mi?id=1752586263114&key=GRP&app=resvlink)

### Payment and Cancelation Policy

Payment is required upon registration. 

Cancelations before October 17th will receive a full refund. Between October 18th and 31st you will receive a full refund only if we are able to find a replacement team. Cancelations after October 31st will receive no refund.

### History

* 2025 - [View the draw](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1JPV3F9vaMueBPvfe8tFZYw0d9Gz3C0qfhyUAoMdFuIs/edit?gid=0#gid=0) \- [Watch the Finals](https://www.youtube.com/live/IumEH7Z6-5U?si=n9R4ZTrT1jY%5Fn-dp)
* 2024 - [View the draw](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQzdbYnJscEjxq6Y88QpZMfVrUfCuJQGJr%5F66C151u0naeyWq7LOYJJzbD22RSosw/pubhtml) \- [Watch the Finals](https://www.youtube.com/live/Dg41bdqleEs)
